executives.name: Darren Stralow
executives.background: Mr Stralow is an experienced mining executive and qualified mining engineer with over 20 years’ industry experience. Prior to joining Bellevue, he held several senior roles at Northern Star Resources (ASX: NST), including Chief Development Officer and General Manager of Operations.

executives.name: Shirley In't Veld
executives.background: Ms. In't Veld has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors. She was formerly the CEO of Verve Energy and has served on the boards of Northern Star Resources and Alumina Limited.
